description: Calculates distance or magnitude for 3D geometric objects
utility: Compute numerical distance between points, lines, planes, or magnitude of vectors

arguments.name: object1
arguments.description: First object (vector3d, line3d, point3d, plane3d, or number for magnitude from origin)

alternates.description: Distance from start to end of line

alternates.syntax: distance3d(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2)
alternates.description: Distance between two points using coordinates
Magnitude of vector from origin to (x, y, z)
Perpendicular distance from point to line
Perpendicular distance from point to plane
Distance between two lines (parallel or skew)
Distance between two parallel planes (0 if intersecting)
